ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a reference to Ceruti`s affiliation to the Moderati academy see Girolamo Della Corte, Dell`Istoria di Verona, Verona, 1594, 1596 (British Library Shelfmarks: 574.n.5.; 179.k.17-19.; 661.b.20.; 661.b.21.; 172.c.1.; 172.c.2.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
